stemHtml: A runway is considered to be contaminated if…

options.a: More than 25% of the runway surface area (whether in isolated areas or not) is covered with wet ice 1.5 mm thick.
options.b: More than 25% of the runway surface area (whether in isolated areas or not) is covered with slush equivalent to 2 mm of water.
options.c: Only if the contaminant covers a connected 25% of the runway surface area (patches of contaminants can add upp to more than 25% of the surface area without effects).
options.d: Less than 25% of the runway surface area (whether in isolated areas or not) is covered with water more than 3 mm deep.
